sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data available for this shmup title

special_mechanics.name: Power-up System
special_mechanics.description: Five color-coded power-up classes: pink (main weapon), green (side weapons), blue (shield regeneration/improvement), orange (extra life), yellow (screen clear). Red power-ups switch main weapon shot style between Darius and Darius II variants.

special_mechanics.name: Persistent Power-ups Post-Destruction
special_mechanics.description: Collected power-ups remain with the ship after player destruction, a unique feature for the series entry.

special_mechanics.name: Ship Movement
special_mechanics.description: Horizontally scrolling shooter with player-controlled Silver Hawk ship. Exact movement mechanics not documented.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Darius Twin is a horizontal scrolling shooter, not a platformer. No precise physics parameters (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration) are documented in available sources. Game focuses on power-up mechanics and shooting rather than character movement physics. Movement appears arcade-style but exact values unavailable.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Darius Twin article (gameplay mechanics, development credits)
Speedrun.com - Darius Twin leaderboards (game existence verification)
